claim: Different file extraction nodes in n8n output to different JSON fields: extract-document-text outputs to 'data', extract-from-pdf outputs to 'text', extract-from-xlsx outputs to 'concatenated_data'
actionable: When chaining multiple file type extraction nodes, normalize outputs using conditional logic: json.data || json.text || json.concatenated_data to handle different field names.
source_title: Effortless RAG in n8n - Use ALL Your Files (PDFs, Excel, and More)

claim: Google Drive mime type parameter determines file type routing in n8n; reference Google's official mimeType documentation to identify correct string for each file format
actionable: Use Google's mimeType reference documentation to map file formats to mime strings (application/pdf, application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet for Excel) for switch routing.
source_title: Effortless RAG in n8n - Use ALL Your Files (PDFs, Excel, and More)

claim: For Excel/CSV table data in RAG, aggregating entire spreadsheet into single string with document chunking is simpler than per-row vector storage, though per-row or n-rows-per-record variants exist
actionable: For RAG with tabular data, start with simple aggregation (entire table as text chunk); optimize granularity later based on query patterns and vector database size constraints.
source_title: Effortless RAG in n8n - Use ALL Your Files (PDFs, Excel, and More)

claim: Delete old vector store records before reinserting updated documents to prevent stale versions from confusing LLM during RAG retrieval
actionable: Add delete-by-id step before document insertion in RAG pipeline to ensure fresh vectors; prevents LLM confusion from encountering multiple versions of same document.
source_title: Effortless RAG in n8n - Use ALL Your Files (PDFs, Excel, and More)

claim: n8n's retrieve documents tool requires fallback handling for different extract node outputs; switch node with mime type branching enables flexible multi-format RAG pipeline
actionable: Implement switch node with mime type conditions to route to format-specific extraction (PDF, Excel, text); use fallback for unspecified formats.
source_title: Effortless RAG in n8n - Use ALL Your Files (PDFs, Excel, and More)
